title: Music Collection - Just Shapes & Beats
description: Adds a new musical experience, New Fragment + New Record Mold + New Structure "Music Shack" + 15 New Records! + New Crafting + New Achievements + Secrets...
body:
# **Music Collection - Just Shapes & Beats**

The **Data Pack + [Resource Pack](https://modrinth.com/project/music-collection-jsb-textures)** combination that adds... **+15 custom discs** to the game, along with a **News Structures** , **New Craftables** and more...🥏 

![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/194d5638309519b0f26b762ec3208de053b1de4f.png)
> **LuisterCorp © - 2025**

## Notas📝 (Notes)
- **Download the [Resource Pack](https://modrinth.com/project/music-collection-jsb-textures) for our disc textures.**
- **Music Collection** modifies textures already existing in the game.🎨
- **Music Collection** is compatible with any generation Datapack in the world.
- **No** add this to an existing world: First reset your own or use a new world.🗂️
- **Music Collection** has recipes for your **discs**, **mold** and **musical fragment.**
- **Use Headphones** for a **better experience.🎧**

## Descripción 🎼 (Description)

**¡Immerse yourself in a completely new musical experience in Minecraft!**✨

- This **Datapack** introduces a set of **music** related features, enriching your adventure in the **Overworld and soon beyond...**.

## Características🗒️ (Features)

### 1. Fragmento Musical (Musical Fragment) 🎵🎶

To be able to craft our **new records**, you must first obtain a new type of **music fragments**, which can be found in **structures** or **manufactured on a crafting table.**.

**‎◾Crafting:**

![Framentos](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/158664ba27e4a5cac988316cf053d6cb7b22cb4f.png)

### 2. Molde de Discos💽 (Disk Mold)

In order to make it you will need the previous **musical fragments**, together with other materials that will help you to get the **disc mold**, with which you will be able to make all the **new discs** of this Datapack.

**◾Crafting:**

![Molde de Discos](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb7abef4ca2c6f6eaabfcb320fd74682f9741df5.png)

### 3. Nuevos Discos Personalizados💿 (New Personalized Discs)

Using the **Disc Mold**, you will be able to craft our entire first **Custom Music Collection** for Minecraft, with songs from.... **Just Shapes & Beats!**

**◾Music Collection - Version 1.1:**

![Librería 1.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4bfe88c59ed1a573229c02ef60cd56a950d7ee6c.png)

### 3.1 ¡Just Shapes & Beats!🎚️

From the rhythm game **Just Shapes & Beats**, music from the **Monstercat** catalog comes to **Minecraft** in this **Datapack**.

![JSaB](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3ef263b19a1d452193572e4c4869c341e7f9a44.png)
> [JustShapes&Beats.com](https://www.justshapesandbeats.com/) | [JustShapes&Beats - Steam](https://store.steampowered.com/app/531510/Just_Shapes__Beats/)

 **+10 🔥** of the **most popular songs** many from the **Monstercat** repertoire have been compiled, with a **custom disc design.**.

**📌Crafteable Discs and Discography:**

### 3.2 ¡Future Music and Musical Suggestions! 🕰️
**News coming soon...🛠️**

![Sugerencias](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/059596bdb799941c963d756a92e45488487969e8.png)
Puedes proponer futuras **nuevas canciones** en el siguiente **formulario📑:**
You can propose future **new songs** in the following **formulario:**.

- **[Propuestas Musicales aquí - Musical Proposals here](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSemIacqrrA9WspVzsGZw80iSxtPAVKTZFNXmxcUPPZVZB4r8g/viewform)📨**
- (The most requested ones will be selected) 🗺️


 
## Estructures ✨

### 1. "Cabaña del Músico"🧭 (Musician's Hut Structure)

The **datapack** adds this **new structure** the **"Musician's Hut 🛖”**, a cabin abandoned many years ago, made of **spruce wood, dark oak, adobe and varieties of rock 🪨.**


**◾Image:**

![Cabaña](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/372b24dddb7b5101b23da8a65fd8cafc5653df9a_0.webp)

Inside you can find various **booties 🕯️** and pieces of history from the past in **hidden books 📕...**.


**◾Images:**

![Barril y Libro](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71a331422115356343ff0ee6de11fbb9c06c43e0.png)![Cofre](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0325db7adfa1d9ac112d554637c64249ffa0f8ce.png)![Big Cofre](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60889ea6004c28414b748727bde709825db92296.png)

We recommend you to **explore** all the corners of this **old cabin**, its generation takes place in **plains, forests of all kinds 🪵** and they are at least **+750 blocks** from each other.🌍

### 2. "Barco de Prismarina"🧭 (Prismarine Ship Structure)

The **datapack update** adds this **new marine structure** the **"Prismarine Ship⛵”**, a shipwreck many years ago, made of **prismarine, and its variations, will be generated in all the oceans of the Overworld🌊.**


**◾Image:**

![Barco Prismarina](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c9f5095e1d338967a9942b246c4cad576bd7c94.png)

**Inside youcan find** several **barrels 🎣** and a special crofre, along with a **new music disc added 🥏,** waiting for you to find it....

**◾Images:**

![Prismarine Ship](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0de71e2dcb3a178aed8303f71da570b6f8a42b7d.png)![Prismarine Barrel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b9926224aa856b06f5bb06f9cd9926d994ddc36.png)![Born Cofre](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d56551017975bebd5afdcfcb875f859768c376d5.png)

## Nuevos Logros 🏆 (New Achievements)

When you get any of the **+15 new discs** of this Datapack, you will get a new section of **perzoned achievements** with references to different movies🎬, series📺 and video games🕹️..

**◾Image:**

![Logros Jsab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10b572462b9829a61fcf481ef03d2e914e08b98b.png)

These **21 Achievements**, are obtained from getting your first **musical fragment 🎼**, finding the **Musician's Cabin 🛖**, "Prismarine Ship⛵” and crafting **all the added records 💿**.

## Procesos de Instalación 💾 (Installation Processes)

Below we invite you to review the correct installation process of our Data Package in the following categories 💥




</details>



<details>
<summary>Singleplayer - Un Jugador</summary>

### Pasos Para Instalar DataPack (Steps to Install DataPack):
1. **Abrir Minecraft (Open Minecraft)**                                      
  Inicia el juego (start the game).
2. **Crea un Nuevo Mundo (Create a New World)**                                 
   Vaya a "Más" y haga clic en **"Paquetes de Datos".** (go to “More” and click on **"Datapacks”**).
   ![Paquete](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2cd776c28c80ac9e88ad59459b8b81d101e4ecc_0.webp)
3. **Añadir el Datapack (Add Datapack)**                                         
   Arrastre el Paquete de Datos (un archivo ``
.zip
`` o directorio) a la ventana de Minecraft.
   
   📟 (Drag the Data Package (a ``
.zip
`` or directory) to the Minecraft window).
   ![Instalación](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c7b7645baff53ff4402c976c6d00fda8f6e8353.png)
   
     Aparecerá una pantalla de confirmación. Haga clic en **"Confirmar".**
     
     📟 (A confirmation screen will appear. Click on **"Confirm ”**).
   ![Disponibles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f0e085ce6b2fbd4c94c2d3640f2f973aac9db3f_0.webp)
4. **Activar el DataPack (Activate the DataPack)**                                        
   Mueva el **Paquete de Datos** al lado derecho de la pantalla haciendo **clic** en el triángulo de su ícono (visible al pasar el cursor sobre él).
   
   📟 Move the **Datapack** to the right side of the screen by **clicking** on its triangle icon (visible when hovering over it).
   ![Crear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a9f20a7025a8c0166fd9c0b65122a406379d8d9_0.webp)
5. **Creación del Mundo Nuevo (Creation of the New World)**                                         
   Haz clic en **"Hecho"** en la parte inferior de la pantalla.
                                        
   📟 (Click **"Done ”** at the bottom of the screen).     
   ![Nuevo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf9ee7ae58e15aa92f32db7ee870ed7ae0764019.png)
   Continúa creando tu mundo y haz clic en **"Crear nuevo mundo".**
   
   📟 (Continue creating your world and click on **"Create new world ”**).
   
###   ⚠️ IMPORTANTE - IMPORTANT⚠️
Se generará un aviso al momento de crear un **mundo nuevo**, ya que son **características experimentales**, cualquier tipo de error puede ser comunicado a nuestro **[Discord Oficial](https://discord.gg/Zj43yM8eac)**

📟 A warning will be generated when creating a **new world**, since these are **experimental features**, any kind of error can be communicated to our **[Discord Oficial](https://discord.gg/Zj43yM8eac)**

![Disclamer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b418358c3db6921a22622c4c6694c4ad9155818f_0.webp)

  Continue dandole al boton **Sí** y disfrute de su Aventura :)

  📟 Continue clicking the **Yes** button and enjoy your adventure :)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Multiplayer - Multijugador</summary>
  
### Pasos Para Instalar DataPack (Steps to Install DataPack):
1. **Abrir la carpeta de tu servidor (Open the folder on your server)**                                          
  Navega hasta la carpeta de tu servidor y luego abre la **carpeta del mundo** en el que deseas instalar el **Paquete de Datos** (predeterminado: ``
world
``).

   Navigate to your server folder and then open the **world folder** in which you want to install the **Datapacks** (default: ``
world
``).

2. **Agrega el DataPack (Add the DataPack)**                                         
   El **Paquete de Datos** debe ser un archivo ``
.zip
``.file.                                         
   Coloca el **Paquete de Datos** en una carpeta llamada ``
datapacks
`` dentro de la carpeta **world.**

   The **DataPack** must be a ``
.zip
`` file.                                         
   Place the **DataPack** in a folder named ``
datapacks
`` inside the **world** folder.

3. **Vuelve a cargar el servidor (reload the server)**                                         
   Escribe ``
/reload
`` desde la consola o como operador de nivel 3, si el servidor estaba ejecutándose durante la instalación.

   Type ``
/reload
`` from the console or as a level 3 operator, if the server was running during installation.

###   ⚠️ IMPORTANTE - IMPORTANT⚠️
Se generará un aviso al momento de crear un **mundo nuevo**, ya que son **características experimentales**, cualquier tipo de error puede ser comunicado a nuestro **[Discord Oficial](https://discord.gg/Zj43yM8eac)**

📟 A warning will be generated when creating a **new world**, since these are **experimental features**, any kind of error can be communicated to our **[Discord Oficial](https://discord.gg/Zj43yM8eac)**
